_comment: Ice Shrine reveal — camera path RECORDED IN-WORLD (/cutscene record, promoted 2026-07-23, replaces the offline-estimated path). Descends toward the shrine (yaw ~141). Cues re-timed to the 95-tick recorded duration; nudge ticks for pacing. Trigger with 'cutscene play ice_shrine_reveal'.

cues.subtitle: §7Prove yourself worthy of the guardian within.
